title: SafeSOC ground_truth
description: Per-case answer key for the SafeSOC offline evaluator, rubric v1.1. Verdict, severity, and action bands follow one condition-level policy across both splits.

security_proposition.description: Optional research metadata stating the security-relevant proposition the case resolves; not consumed by C1-C4.

acceptable_severity.description: The severity band C2 checks the LLM against (a range, not a point).

supporting_evidence.description: Evidence ids (A0/EV-xxx) that warrant the correct verdict.

counter_evidence.description: Benign/contradicting evidence ids the LLM must heed (C3).

must_not_assert.description: Absent facts the LLM must not claim (C1; mainly for 'missing' cases).

acceptable_actions.description: The bidirectional action band C4 checks against. The band is fixed by evidence condition.

operational_response.description: Optional deployment metadata; it does not expand or replace the five-value C4 action band.

the_trap.description: One line: the specific over/under-triage failure this case probes.

rationale.description: Annotator's evidence -> verdict justification, tied to the rubric.

review_status.description: Either canonical benchmark review or a dated pre-model freeze; status metadata is not consumed by C1-C4.
